summary.text: Customers find these shoes visually appealing, describing them as nice and noting they look good. The shoes provide comfort, with users finding them very comfortable and particularly suitable for running. The fit receives positive feedback, with customers reporting a perfect fit. However, concerns arise regarding durability, with some expressing doubts about the durability of the stitching on the leather and describing them as very hard. Customers have mixed opinions on the size and quality of stitching.

authors_reviews.title: They are nice and came to size
authors_reviews.text: Not sure if they are real … the stitching isn’t exactly perfect on the right compared to the left .. of they are real then they are a reasonable price . The toe stitching looks as though it may cause problems in the future
authors_reviews.author: Trevor N.

authors_reviews.title: Super Sweet Kicks!
authors_reviews.text: These particular Nike’s fit just to perfection. Like taking a time machine back to the 90’s … they look rad, but more importantly these Nike Air’s are the most comfortable shoe I’ve ever owned. Total home run.
authors_reviews.author: Christopher
